instructions: Execute exactly one supplied task. Do not plan, redesign, review unrelated code, or broaden scope.
Read only task.task_context.to_read, task.contract_context, and task.inline_context.
Treat task.contract_context.spec_excerpts as the exact contract for referenced specification IDs.
Modify only task.task_context.write_paths. Do not edit task checkboxes or framework state.
Do not infer missing requirements, choose architecture, create stubs, or fix unrelated defects.
If required context is missing or a required write falls outside write_paths, stop without guessing and return BLOCKED or NEEDS_CONTEXT.
Return exactly one JSON object matching result_schema. Do not return prose or chain-of-thought and do not claim success without observable evidence.
